rationale: Educ. Code §8.151 defines terms for a mental health subchapter. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption and contains no overlapping provisions.
quote:
Sec. 8.151. DEFINITIONS. In this subchapter:
(1) "Executive commissioner" means the executive commissioner of the Health and Human Services Commission.
_note: Rule text pertains to mental health authority definitions; no relevance to proposed homestead exemption change.
